name: Operator Kit
description: Scaffold a full AI operator: identity, memory system, instincts, cron jobs, agent architecture, and trust ladder

operatorName.label: Operator Name
operatorName.help: The name of your AI operator (e.g., 'Imogen', 'Jarvis', 'Friday')

ownerName.label: Owner Name
ownerName.help: Your name — the operator will reference you by this

enableMemorySystem.label: Memory System
enableMemorySystem.help: Daily logs + evergreen references for cross-session continuity

enableInstincts.label: Instinct Engine
enableInstincts.help: Confidence-weighted learned behaviors that evolve over time

enableCronJobs.label: Cron Jobs
enableCronJobs.help: Starter cron jobs (morning briefing, nightly rundown, security check)

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.help: IANA timezone for cron scheduling (e.g., America/New_York)
